title: cola liberica
intro: Cola liberica is a species of evergreen tree native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Sterculiaceae. The tree is valued for its medicinal properties, including analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Cola liberica is also known for its health benefits, including its antioxidant and immunomodulatory properties, which may help protect against oxidative stress and support immune function. The seeds and leaves of the Cola liberica tree are used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, and have also been used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions.
